Our Agents

100X your Efficiency,
Automated and easy.

Leverage AI to build highly personalised automation campaigns at scale in seconds, not days.

Most Popular
AGENT 01

Lynco

LinkedIn Comment Automation

Comments on your prospects' LinkedIn posts, builds warm relationships, and turns cold profiles into real conversations — without you lifting a finger.

  • Up to 400 prospect profiles / month
  • Trained on your tone & ICP
  • Connection requests + follow-ups
  • Human approval mode available
Deploy
New
AGENT 02

Bleo

SEO & AEO Blog Engine

150 SEO-ready articles every month — 10 pillar pieces + 140 supporting blogs — structured to rank on Google AND AI search engines.

  • 150 articles/month — pillar + cluster
  • Optimised for Google, Perplexity & ChatGPT
  • Auto-published to your CMS
  • Full metadata, schema & internal links
Deploy
New
AGENT 03

Bako

Backlink Engine

Quietly builds your website's reputation with 1,500+ quality backlinks every month from real, relevant websites — boosting your Google ranking over time.

  • 1,500+ quality backlinks / month
  • Only niche-relevant, high-authority sites
  • Automated outreach to webmasters
  • Monthly DA health report
Deploy
Available
AGENT 04

Coro

Content Repurpose Engine

Post once, Coro handles the rest. Takes your content and rewrites it for LinkedIn, Instagram, Twitter/X, Facebook, WhatsApp — in the right tone.

  • One source → all platforms, within hours
  • Native tone adapted per channel
  • Hashtag + posting time optimisation
  • Zero manual reformatting
Deploy
Available
AGENT 05

Posto

Social Post Automation

4 brand-aligned posts every day across your social channels. Tracks trends, writes in your voice, keeps your audience engaged — automatically.

  • 4 original posts/day, all channels
  • Trend-aware, ICP-targeted content
  • Writes, schedules & publishes autonomously
  • Monthly analytics & growth report
Deploy
Available
AGENT 06

Dimo

LinkedIn DM Automation

Slides into the right inboxes at the right time. Sends personalised DMs based on your prospect's activity — no spam, just conversations that convert.

  • Personalised DMs at scale
  • Triggered by prospect activity
  • Multi-step follow-up sequences
  • Hands off warm leads to your team
Deploy
Available
AGENT 07

Emeo

Email Conversation Agent

Manages your inbox 24/7. Reads incoming emails, understands them, and replies in under 2 minutes — trained on your products, FAQs, and tone.

  • Replies in under 2 mins, 24/7
  • Trained on product, pricing & FAQs
  • Escalates hot leads to sales
  • Full CRM sync + conversation logging
Deploy
Available
AGENT 08

Otto

Email Outreach Engine

Up to 10,000 personalised cold emails every day — each one tailored to the prospect's role, company, and context. Fully managed infrastructure.

  • Up to 10,000 emails/day
  • Dedicated warmed domain infrastructure
  • Multi-step drip sequences
  • A/B testing + reply handoff
Deploy

Want the full growth stack? Start with one agent, scale to the whole team.

How It Works

From kickoff to live agents
in 7 days.

No 6-month rollouts. No bloated onboarding. We move fast because your growth can't wait.

01
Day 1–2

Discover & Strategise

We map your ICP, tone of voice, and growth goals. Then identify the highest-leverage agents for your stack.

02
Day 3–7

Train & Deploy

Your agents are trained on your brand voice, product data, and competitive context. Infrastructure handled. You approve the tone.

03
Day 8+

Monitor & Optimise

Weekly performance reports, A/B testing, and continuous tuning. Direct Slack access. We iterate until the numbers compound.

AI Growth Stack
$499/month

Everything you need to run a fully-autonomous B2B growth engine.

  • Up to 5 AI Agents active
  • Custom brand voice training
  • CRM + email integrations
  • Weekly performance reports
  • Dedicated Slack channel
  • Human approval mode
Get Started Free

No lock-in · Cancel anytime · 7-day deployment

FAQ

Questions, answered.

If you don't see yours here, just ask us directly — we reply within 24 hours.

Most clients are live within 7 days of kickoff. That includes discovery, agent training on your brand voice, CRM integrations, and domain warm-up for email agents. Complex deployments with multiple agents typically take 10–14 days.
